headline: Citi lifts Novo Nordisk target on strong GLP-1 pill launch
summary: Citi has raised its price target on Novo Nordisk (NYSE:NVO) to DKK330 ahead of second-quarter results on 5 August, citing the strength of the Danish drugmaker's Wegovy pill launch. The broker lifted its 2026 sales and operating income estimates by 4% to 5%, and its earnings per share...

headline: Oil-Service Companies Set to Reveal War’s Impact on Earnings
